coaches.name: Andrew Mateljan
coaches.title: Director & Head Coach
coaches.bio: Twenty years developing competitive players from junior foundations to professional tour. Former #3 SoCal and #12 nationally ranked junior. Seven years coaching internationally across Spain, Croatia, and Norway shaped a movement-first approach grounded in clarity and accountability. Currently coaches ATP #262 Karue Sell. Training history includes Max McKennon (ATP #458), Ryan Seggerman (ATP #63 Doubles), with Masters 1000 experience at Indian Wells. Founder of Fit4Tennis platform serving 100K+ users worldwide.
coaches.quoteExtended: Structure creates confidence, and confidence creates champions.
coaches.schemaDescription: ATP/WTA Tour Coach with 20+ years experience. Former #3 SoCal and #12 nationally ranked junior.

coaches.name: Robert LeBuhn
coaches.title: Director of Tennis Operations
coaches.specialization: Director of Tennis Operations · USPTR Certified
coaches.bio: Twenty-five years developing players from junior foundations to collegiate competition. USPTR-certified professional who trained at the Harry Hopman Academy and competed as a Top 20 USTA Eastern junior and 1983 New Jersey State Singles Champion. Played NCAA Division I tennis at Lafayette College. Multiple Coach of the Year honoree across New Jersey, Union County, Somerset County, and San Diego CIF. Certified in Adaptive Tennis, Cardio Tennis, and CPR/AED.
coaches.schemaDescription: USPTR-certified professional with 25+ years developing players from junior foundations to collegiate competition. NCAA D1 at Lafayette College.

coaches.name: Michelle Mateljan
coaches.title: Coach
coaches.bio: Michelle brings steady energy and clear communication to every session — from fundamentals to competitive drills. Players know her for consistent support on court and genuine investment in progress.
coaches.quote: Every rally is a chance to grow.
coaches.schemaDescription: LBTA coach focused on junior and adult development with a clear, encouraging on-court presence.

coaches.name: Peter DeFrantz
coaches.title: Head Coach, Player Development
coaches.specialization: USPTA & PTR Certified Professional · College Tennis at Mt. San Jacinto · 8+ Years Coaching
coaches.bio: Peter grew up on the tennis court — his father coached high school tennis — and learned early that the game is about more than strokes: how you carry yourself, compete, and treat people. College tennis at Mt. San Jacinto College; dual USPTA and PTR certified. Eight years coaching across Southern California with a progressive, player-centered approach.
coaches.quote: Build the player, not just the game.
coaches.schemaDescription: Head Coach, Player Development. USPTA and PTR certified. College tennis at Mt. San Jacinto College. 8+ years coaching across Southern California.

coaches.name: Allison Cronk
coaches.title: Coach
coaches.bio: Allison played varsity tennis at Mira Costa High School, then competed at Westcliff University (NAIA) and Shepherd University (NCAA) — Dean's List every semester at both. She has coached at five academies across Orange County and the South Bay. Beginners, juniors, adults, competitors. She adapts to whoever is on the other side of the net.
coaches.quote: She doesn't just teach the game. She teaches the person playing it.
coaches.schemaDescription: Collegiate player and educator. 5+ years coaching across five academies. NCAA and NAIA tennis. B.A. History, Education minor.
